RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT BERKSHIRE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For An Order Setting Aside Entry Of Default And Vacating The Default Judgment Entered Against Berkshire Life Insurance Co. Of America: GRANTED. Order signed. (301/AS/JL-X) Reporter: Valerie Papale, CSR #6899

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William Lee, Esq., Kelly, Herlihy & Klein LLP (415) 981-0535 for Defendant and Moving Party Berkshire Life Insurance Company
Albert Beerbower, Plaintiff Propria Persona
RULING:
The Court's tentative ruling stated no opposition had been filed; Plaintiff presented to the Court a copy of his opposition filed June 23, 2004. DEFENDANT BERKSHIRE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For An Order Setting Aside Entry Of Default And Vacating The Default Judgmnt Entered Against Berkshire Life Ins Co. Of America is CONTINUED to 07/08/04 in Dept. 301. (301/PHA/) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Plaintiff, Albert Beerbower present in pro per, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Berkshire Life Insurance Company.
Principal of $885,000.00
Costs of $45.00
For the total of $885,045.00
Judgment signed in open court.
